query:
-- Find all projects with LNG/offshore/FLNG/pipeline keywords that are tagged NT or other non-WA states
SELECT id, name, projectState, sector, priority, lifecycleStatus, suppressed
FROM projects
WHERE (
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%barossa%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%flng%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%prelude%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%scarborough%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%pluto%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%gorgon%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%ichthys%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%inpex%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%north west shelf%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%nws%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%crux%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jansz%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%wheatstone%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%bw opal%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%fpso%'
)
ORDER BY priority DESC, name ASC;

SELECT id, name, projectState, sector, priority, lifecycleStatus, suppressed
FROM projects
WHERE (
  LOWER(name) LIKE '%barossa%'

  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%prelude%'

  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%inpex%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%north west shelf%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%nws%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%crux%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jansz%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%wheatstone%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%bw opal%'
  OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%fpso%'

ORDER BY priority DESC, name ASC;
